name: Swedish Limpa Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order specified by your bread machine instructions.
2. Ensure the dough is well mixed and ready for baking.
3. Place the dough into a greased loaf pan.
4. Cover the pan with a lid or plastic wrap.
5. Bake according to your bread machine settings.
6. Once baked, remove the bread from the machine and let it cool on a wire rack.
Enjoy your delicious homemade Swedish Limpa Bread!
